jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Frontend Developer at CDAC
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at CDAC. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Frontend Developer to strengthen our Pune-based team.

About CDAC:
CDAC is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in MongoDB

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Professional development and training programs
• Learning & development budget
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Pune, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with CDAC!
